DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One channel for each tank may be inoperative deactivated.

Note.rev:revHighlight: Add NOTE to highlight the case of both channels inop
Note.Para: If both channel of tank inop, refer to MEL item 28-41-01-01 and 28-41-01-02. MEL 28-41-01 is the higher system level item and supersedes the requirements of MEL 28-41-02 when applied.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inoperative FQDC channel (AMM DDG 28-41-02).

ListItem.Para: For channel A inoperative, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker FUEL QTY DATA CONCENTOR-C CHAN A and lock with an INOP tag.

Note.Para: Opening and locking of circuit breaker FUEL QTY DATA CONCENTOR-C CHAN A results in the display of FUEL TEMP INDICATION C status message. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 28-43-01-01.

ListItem.Para: For channel B inoperative, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker FUEL QTY DATA CONCENTOR-C CHAN B and lock with an INOP tag.
For channel A inoperative, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker FUEL QTY DATA CONCENTOR-L CHAN A and lock with an INOP tag.

Note.Para: Opening and locking of circuit breaker FUEL QTY DATA CONCENTOR-L CHAN A results in the display of FUEL TEMP INDICATION L status message. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 28-43-01-02.

ListItem.Para: For channel B inoperative, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker FUEL QTY DATA CONCENTOR-L CHAN B and lock with an INOP tag.
For channel A inoperative, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker FUEL QTY DATA CONCENTOR-R CHAN A and lock with an INOP tag.

Note.Para: Opening and locking of circuit breaker FUEL QTY DATA CONCENTOR-R CHAN A results in the display of FUEL TEMP INDICATION R status message. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 28-43-01-02.

ListItem.Para: For channel B inoperative, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker FUEL QTY DATA CONCENTOR-R CHAN B and lock with an INOP tag.
